headline: Tyson Foods Announces Jeff Schomburger to Succeed Donnie King as President and CEO
summary: SPRINGDALE, Ark., May 28, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Tyson Foods, Inc. (NYSE: TSN) announced today that Jeff Schomburger has been named President and Chief Executive Officer, effective October 4, 2026. Following a period of transition beginning in July, Schomburger will succeed King who has had an incredible 43-year career with the company. Schomburger has been a member of the Tyson Foods Board of Directors since 2016, providing him a strong understanding of the company’s operations and strategy.

headline: Tyson Foods hires Jeff Schomburger as CEO
summary: The executive takes over for Donnie King, who has been with the meat and chicken processor for 43 years, including the last five as CEO.
